Please also refer to [nextgen-framework](https://gitlab.mgmt.ai.se/nextgeninfra/nextgen_framework), which implements the concepts introduced in this section as a Python software package. The repository is also available as supplementary material to this report.

{{< include _nextgen_architecture.qmd >}}

{{< include _nextgen_usage.qmd >}}

{{< include _nextgen_limitations.qmd >}}

{{< include _nextgen_flower.qmd >}}
